description_long: This lantern features a robust, cylindrical metal base with a slightly raised circular platform at its center, likely for holding a fuel source or light element. Two thick, arched metal supports rise symmetrically from the base, curving upward to connect to a conical-topped housing that would typically contain the light source. The lantern's design is reminiscent of traditional oil or kerosene lanterns, with a utilitarian, industrial appearance and a matte, weathered finish. A small, round knob and a latch are visible on the base, suggesting mechanisms for opening or adjusting the lantern. The central section, where a glass enclosure would typically be found, appears open or missing, exposing the interior. The overall construction is solid and functional, suitable for outdoor or urban environments.
description: A sturdy, industrial-style metal lantern with a cylindrical base, arched supports, and a conical top, featuring a weathered matte finish and utilitarian details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular base, central platform, arched supports, and visible knob and latch details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the arched supports and the profile of the conical top, with the knob and latch less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but with the latch and knob on the opposite side, showing symmetry in the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the arched support and conical top in profile and the knob and latch on the far side.
